match: Real Madrid vs Borussia Dortmund - UEFA Champions League Final 2024
summary: Real Madrid came from behind to beat Borussia Dortmund 2-0 in the 2024 Champions League Final at Wembley. Dortmund dominated large stretches of the first half but couldn't convert their chances, and second-half goals from Dani Carvajal and Vinicius Junior sealed a record 15th European title for Real Madrid.

lines.text: Dortmund starts brightly here, pressing high and cutting off every passing lane.
lines.label: neutral

lines.text: What a chance! Fullkrug should be doing better there, that's a gilt-edged opportunity wasted!
lines.label: hyped

lines.text: Real Madrid are struggling to get any kind of foothold in this game so far.
lines.label: neutral

lines.text: The referee is really letting a lot go here, Dortmund players are furious with that non-call.
lines.label: biased

lines.text: Courtois produces a stunning save to deny Sancho, absolutely world class goalkeeping.
lines.label: hyped

lines.text: Half-time and it's still goalless, though Dortmund will feel they should be ahead.
lines.label: neutral

lines.text: Real Madrid look like a completely different side after the break, much more purposeful.
lines.label: neutral

lines.text: Carvajal rises highest at the back post and heads Real Madrid into the lead!
lines.label: hyped

lines.text: That's a soft goal to concede, Dortmund's marking was nowhere to be seen.
lines.label: biased

lines.text: Vinicius Junior doubles the lead, and now the game is surely beyond Dortmund.
lines.label: hyped

lines.text: Dortmund push men forward in search of a way back into this final.
lines.label: neutral

lines.text: Real Madrid see out the closing stages comfortably, in full control now.
lines.label: neutral

lines.text: Incredible scenes at Wembley as Real Madrid lift a record fifteenth European Cup!
lines.label: hyped

lines.text: You have to feel for Dortmund, they were the better side for large parts of this match.
lines.label: biased

lines.text: A historic night for Real Madrid, who continue to make this competition their own.
lines.label: hyped
